About PolicyRadar

PolicyRadar is an intelligent policy intelligence platform that tracks over 270+ Indian government sources, think tanks, courts, and media outlets to bring you comprehensive policy updates.

Key Features

  • Real-time monitoring of 270+ policy sources
  • AI-powered relevance scoring and categorization
  • Multi-dimensional filtering by sector, source, and impact
  • Daily updates at 2 AM IST
  • Export capabilities for research and analysis

Data Sources

We aggregate content from:

  • Government ministries and departments
  • Regulatory bodies (RBI, SEBI, TRAI, etc.)
  • Courts and legal sources
  • Think tanks and research organizations
  • Trusted media outlets

Contact

For inquiries or suggestions: contact@policyradar.in
